chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-429 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.09.2025 Mr. Yasir Khoso, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh ----- Learned Counsel for Petitioner states that the purpose of filing this Petition has been served, as such, he does not press instant Petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
